mapper.update: UPDATE admin SET ADMIN_ID = #{et.adminId}, ADMIN_NAME = #{et.adminName}, ADMIN_PASSWORD = #{et.adminPassword}, ADMIN_TOKEN = #{et.adminToken}, ADMIN_TOKEN_TIME = #{et.adminTokenTime}, ADMIN_ADD_TIME = #{et.adminAddTime}, _pid = #{et.pid}, ADMIN_NICKNAME = #{et.adminNickname}, ADMIN_INTRO = #{et.adminIntro}, ADMIN_AVATAR = #{et.adminAvatar}, ADMIN_INFO_UPDATE_TIME = #{et.adminInfoUpdateTime} WHERE _id = #{et.id}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM admin WHERE ADMIN_NAME = #{username} LIMIT 1
